title: ProfessorConnect – Academic Job Portal Website

requirements.text: Create a Motoko backend actor that stores faculty job listings with fields: institute name, position title (Assistant Professor / Associate Professor / Professor), department, location, application deadline, and apply URL. Expose query functions to list all jobs, filter jobs by institute/department/location/position type, and admin functions to add, edit, and remove job listings. Seed the actor with at least 10 realistic sample faculty job listings in Engineering and Science departments from Indian institutes (e.g., IITs, NITs, IISc, IISERs).

quotes: Ensure jobs can be easily added, edited, or removed later
Jobs can be stored in static format or simple database

acceptanceCriteria: Backend stores job listings with all required fields
Query function returns all jobs
Filter function accepts optional parameters for institute, department, location, and position type and returns matching jobs
Add, edit, and remove functions are callable
At least 10 sample listings are seeded on deployment

requirements.text: Implement a multi-page React frontend with client-side routing for four pages: Home, Jobs, About, and Contact. The top navigation bar must display the logo/brand name 'ProfessorConnect' on the left and navigation links (Home, Jobs, About, Contact) on the right. The footer must display '© 2026 ProfessorConnect. All rights reserved.'

quotes: Clean navigation menu at the top
Display footer text: '© 2026 ProfessorConnect. All rights reserved.'

acceptanceCriteria: Navigation bar is present on all pages with brand name and page links
Client-side routing works for all four pages without full reload
Footer with the specified text appears on every page
Layout is fully mobile responsive

requirements.text: Build the Home page with: (1) a hero section displaying 'ProfessorConnect' as the primary heading and 'Find the Latest Assistant Professor Jobs in Engineering and Science' as the tagline, plus a short explanation of the platform's purpose and a prominent 'Browse Jobs' call-to-action button; (2) a 'How It Works' or key features section with cards highlighting 'Latest Faculty Job Listings', 'Easy Job Search', and 'Centralized Academic Job Portal'; (3) a brief stats or highlights strip (e.g., number of live listings, institutes covered).

quotes: Display website name 'ProfessorConnect' prominently
Display tagline below the title
Professional hero section explaining the purpose of the platform
Section highlighting key features

acceptanceCriteria: Hero section shows brand name, tagline, and a CTA button
Key features section displays at least three feature cards
Page communicates the platform's academic focus clearly

requirements.text: Build the Jobs page that fetches all job listings from the backend via the Motoko actor. Display jobs in a card grid layout, each card showing: institute name, position title, department, location, application deadline, and an 'Apply Now' button that opens the official institute URL in a new tab. Include a search bar for free-text search across institute/department/position fields and filter dropdowns for Institute, Department, Location, and Position Type. Filtering and search must update results in real time without page reload.

quotes: Display faculty job listings in a structured table or card format
Provide search functionality
Provide filtering options by: Institute, Department, Location, Position type
Apply link button that redirects to official institute website

acceptanceCriteria: Jobs page loads and displays all listings from the backend
Each card shows all required fields and a working Apply Now button
Search bar filters results by text in real time
Dropdown filters for Institute, Department, Location, and Position Type work correctly
Combining search and filters narrows results correctly

requirements.text: Build the About page with sections covering: (1) the mission of ProfessorConnect and how it simplifies academic job search; (2) the platform's target users (PhD scholars, postdoctoral researchers, academic professionals, faculty seeking new opportunities); (3) a future vision section describing planned AI-powered academic job matching, CV upload, automated job scraping, and personalized notifications. Write all copy in a professional academic tone.

quotes: Explain the mission of ProfessorConnect
Explain future vision of AI-powered academic job matching
Write in a professional academic tone

acceptanceCriteria: About page contains mission, target users, and future vision sections
Copy is written in a professional academic tone
Page layout is clean and readable

requirements.text: Build the Contact page with a contact form containing Name, Email, and Message fields with validation. Below or beside the form, display a placeholder contact email (e.g., contact@professorconnect.in). The form submission should show a success confirmation message to the user. No real email delivery is required at this stage.

quotes: Contact form with fields: Name, Email, Message
Include placeholder contact email

acceptanceCriteria: Contact form has Name, Email, and Message fields
Form validates that all fields are filled and email format is valid before submission
On submission a success message is shown
Placeholder contact email is displayed on the page

requirements.text: Apply a cohesive professional academic visual theme across all pages: primary palette of navy/dark blue, white, and dark gray; clean sans-serif typography with clear hierarchy; generous whitespace and minimal decorative elements; card components with subtle shadows; mobile-first responsive grid. The overall aesthetic should feel like a polished startup-quality academic platform.

quotes: Modern, minimal, professional academic design
Use professional academic color scheme (blue, white, dark gray)
Professional startup-quality appearance
Clean typography and spacing
Mobile responsive design

acceptanceCriteria: Color scheme consistently uses navy/dark blue, white, and dark gray tones
Typography is clean and hierarchically structured across all pages
All pages are fully responsive on mobile, tablet, and desktop
Cards, buttons, and interactive elements follow a consistent visual style

requirements.text: Generate a logo mark image for ProfessorConnect: a minimal academic-style icon combining a mortarboard cap and a search/magnifier motif, rendered in navy blue and white on a transparent background, suitable for use in the navigation bar.

quotes: Website name must be displayed as 'ProfessorConnect'

acceptanceCriteria: Logo image is placed in frontend/public/assets/generated/
Logo is rendered in the navigation bar beside the brand name
Logo is legible at small navigation bar sizes

requirements.text: Generate a hero background illustration for the Home page: an abstract academic/research-themed graphic with subtle geometric shapes, graduation caps, and science/engineering icons, rendered in navy blue and light blue tones, suitable as a wide hero section background.

quotes: Professional hero section explaining the purpose of the platform

acceptanceCriteria: Hero background image is placed in frontend/public/assets/generated/
Image is used as the hero section background on the Home page
Text in the hero section remains legible over the image

constraints: Website name must always appear as 'ProfessorConnect' — no personal names in the main branding
Footer text must read exactly: '© 2026 ProfessorConnect. All rights reserved.'
All generated images must be served from frontend/public/assets/generated/ — do not route them through the backend
Do not edit files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
nonGoals: User login, authentication, or Internet Identity integration (future phase)
Automated job scraping from external sources (future phase)
International job markets beyond India (future phase)
Real email sending from the contact form

required: Minimal academic logo mark combining a mortarboard graduation cap and a magnifier/search icon, navy blue and white on transparent background (professor-connect-logo.dim_128x128.png)

Wide abstract hero background illustration featuring subtle geometric patterns, graduation caps, and science/engineering iconography in navy blue and light blue tones (hero-background.dim_1440x600.png)
